text: BACKEND ARCHITECTURE

text: We built a reusable model service behind the women-facing app
textPreview: We built a reusable model service behind the women-facing app

text: FastAPI serves a saved NumPy logistic-regression model trained on public NHANES 2021-2023 data.

text: Target definition
textPreview: Target definition

text: Self-reported menopause/change of life as the reason for not having regular periods.
textPreview: Self-reported menopause/change of life as the reason for not having regular periods.

text: This target is self-reported in NHANES. It is not clinically confirmed menopause.
textPreview: This target is self-reported in NHANES. It is not clinically confirmed menopause.

text: MODEL AND ARTIFACTS
textPreview: MODEL AND ARTIFACTS

text: Training creates a portable inference package
textPreview: Training creates a portable inference package

text: The model is class-balanced logistic regression implemented with NumPy.
textPreview: The model is class-balanced logistic regression implemented with NumPy.

text: Model parameters
textPreview: Model parameters

text: Weights and bias are saved in a compressed NumPy artifact.
textPreview: Weights and bias are saved in a compressed NumPy artifact.

text: Preprocessing
textPreview: Preprocessing

text: Feature order, imputation medians, category mappings, scaling means, and scaling standard deviations are saved.
textPreview: Feature order, imputation medians, category mappings, scaling means, and scaling standard deviations are saved.

text: Decision rule
textPreview: Decision rule

text: The classification threshold, evaluation metrics, and metadata are saved in JSON.
textPreview: The classification threshold, evaluation metrics, and metadata are saved in JSON.

text: Inference uses the same preprocessing as training, fitted on the training split only.
textPreview: Inference uses the same preprocessing as training, fitted on the training split only.

text: API FOR THE FRONTEND
textPreview: API FOR THE FRONTEND

text: Lovable talks to one women-facing prediction API
textPreview: Lovable talks to one women-facing prediction API

text: The API returns an estimate, a likelihood band, careful explanation, and model-score contributions.
textPreview: The API returns an estimate, a likelihood band, careful explanation, and model-score contributions.

GET /api/v1/feature-schema

textPreview: Prediction

text:

Returns probability and lower, moderate, or higher band.

Explains dataset, model, performance, and limitations.

text: Feature contributions describe what contributed to the model score, not what caused menopause.
